apenasDestaques.title: So Destaques
apenasDestaques.description: If true, returns only highlighted events.

categoria.title: Categoria
categoria.description: Event category filter such as Music, Theater or Festival.

cidade.title: Localidade
cidade.description: The city where the event takes place.

dataFim.title: Data Fim
dataFim.description: Search events until this date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

dataInicio.title: Data Inicio
dataInicio.description: Search events from this date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

nomeEvento.title: Palavra-chave
nomeEvento.description: Keyword or part of the event name to search.
